ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the company */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) of the company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings (PE) ratio of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the stock information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the trading day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the trading day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock */,
  "updown" INTEGER /* Indicates if the stock price went up (1), down (-1), or remained the same (0) */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "change_percentage" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market trading price */,
  "after_market_price" REAL /* After-market trading price */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Yahoo Finance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Date and time the data source was last synced */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data source is synced (e.g., daily, hourly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  "rule_query" TEXT /* SQL query or logic for the validation rule */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rule is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the validation rule */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the validation rule was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the validation rule */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time the validation rule was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the validation rule that failed */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price entry that failed validation */,
  "error_date" TEXT /* Date when the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message or description */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the error has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the error */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date and time the error was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_errors_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_errors_validation_id FOREIGN KEY ("validation_id") REFERENCES data_validations ("validation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., moving average, momentum) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the analysis */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Specific algorithm used for the trend analysis */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the trend analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_analysis_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading signal */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "signal_date" TEXT /* Date of the signal */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of signal (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price entry that triggered the signal */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the signal */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Specific algorithm used to generate the trading signal */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the trading signal generation */,
  "executed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the signal has been executed */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date and time the signal was executed */,
  "execution_price" REAL /* Price at which the signal was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_query" TEXT /* SQL query or logic used to generate the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data or results of the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., theme, notification settings) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "preferred_timezone" TEXT /* Preferred timezone of the user */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
